summary: Stage B of B (the /gogo:xplan browser kanban + FR8 sweep). Built assets/xplan-board/: a React+Vite app ported from xplan (TONE palette + .wf-panel shell in tokens.ts/board.css, BoardColumns/Card look, native HTML5 DnD via one dragId; four fixed columns plan/in-progress/ready/changelog fed by GET /api/board polled ~3s and paused while dragging; live text filter; per-card view link to the pre-built page; ready-card checkboxes + a footer 'Mark done (N)->one merged entry' bar; drag ready->changelog ships, dragging a selected card ships the whole selection, illegal drags bounce with a hint; POST /api/ship schema-2 with action ship|ship-merged; 'shipping...' toast cleared when the shipped slug reads column=changelog). Committed dist/ (160K, base:'./' relative asset paths) so users need no npm; node_modules gitignored (D4=A). server.py is pure-stdlib/pure-ASCII/localhost-only: serves dist/, /view/* + /viewer/* + /mermaid.min.js from the view-root parent (so pages' ../ links resolve), GET /api/board (re-read per request), POST /api/ship (shape + ready-only guard, atomic tmp+rename, 202/400/409/500), --port auto-rolls to next free, writes server.pid, SIGTERM/SIGINT clean shutdown, --selftest (intent+ready+path-traversal guards) exit 0/2. Authored skills/gogo-xplan/SKILL.md (classify->build board.json->pre-build pages via gogo-view->serve+open->watch ship-intent->gogo-done writer->rebuild, live-refresh loop; degradation: no python3 -> point at /gogo:done, port busy, browser won't open, dist missing) + thin commands/xplan.md. FR8 sweep: plugin.json 0.10.0; command count 12->13 in docs/commands.md + docs/architecture.md; removed all stale TUI/cockpit/board.py/tmux/kanban wording from skills/gogo, skills/gogo-status, README, docs/{index,commands,flow,architecture} and added the /gogo:xplan surface; fixed the false board.py vendored-executable examples in the four named knowledge files (coding-rules, tech-stack, non-functional-requirements, test-strategy) to server.py/the React board (test-strategy TUI-section full rewrite left for report per plan, with a 0.10.0 deferral note). VERIFIED: npm run build green; python3 -m py_compile OK; server.py --selftest exit 0; live smoke on a fixture (GET /api/board 200, POST valid 202 + intent file, non-ready 400, pending 409, bad JSON 400, /view path traversal contained 404 no leak, SIGTERM cleans server.pid); no node_modules/__pycache__ in the git add set. state.md not touched (per orchestrator). charts/ not regenerated (per orchestrator; as-built matches charts/xplan-board-flow.mmd, no drift). gogo-done writer + Stage A files unchanged. No forks to escalate. ROUND 3 (Stage-B review fixes, all 5): REV-003 dropped the dead `version` chip + field from App.tsx; REV-004 added non-202 error toasts (server message) + a ~3-min ship watchdog that downgrades the stuck info toast to a dismissible warning (polling continues); REV-005 repointed testing-tools.md --selftest to server.py + marked project-knowledge.md's 0.9.0 TUI bullet replaced by the 0.10.0 browser board; REV-006 made the intent write TOCTOU-safe (unique mkstemp tmp + O_CREAT|O_EXCL claim on the rename target); REV-007 (HARDEN per D5) added a Host allowlist (403 on non-localhost) to all methods + an Origin same-or-absent check (403) on POST /api/ship, both in --selftest. Rebuilt dist/ (npm run build green, new hashes index-ZcFX_2OX.js / index-BwdjX2wT.css; 'still waiting on gogo' + toast-warn/toast-dismiss present; version-chip code gone -- only React's own .version remains). py_compile OK; --selftest exit 0 incl. the new Host/Origin checks; live smoke: valid ship 202, evil Host 403, evil Origin 403 (no intent written), pending 409, non-ready 400, pid cleaned on SIGTERM. No node_modules/__pycache__ in the git add set. state.md, the 0.8.0 writer, and .gogo/changelog untouched.
